response.justification: Bogdan Szabo demonstrates extensive full-stack development experience with a strong focus on TypeScript, Node.js, and React across multiple roles, including recent work in AI-agent infrastructure at re:cinq. His background aligns well with the primary stack and responsibilities, and his leadership in open-source projects (e.g., GISCollective) highlights his architectural and collaborative skills. While his experience with Kotlin/Java is limited to select projects, his depth in TypeScript and polyglot programming compensates effectively.
strengths: Deep expertise in TypeScript, Node.js, and React with recent full-stack contributions in AI-agent infrastructure
Strong open-source contributions and leadership in GISCollective, demonstrating architectural and collaborative skills
Proven track record in optimizing systems (e.g., Direct Mail automation at Optilyz) and scaling high-traffic microservices (e.g., at Dunnhumby) with low-latency solutions
concerns: Limited direct experience with Kotlin/Java outside select projects, though he has worked with Java in the past
Primary experience with MongoDB (NoSQL) rather than relational databases like PostgreSQL/MySQL, though he has SQL experience
GitLab focus in dev-ops work may not directly translate to GitHub-centric workflows, though Git proficiency is clearly established
